# Visualize

## About

This page documents visualizations of the ARRL Field Day 2010-2025 data.

## Setup

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
```


## Import

```{r}
fd <- readr::read_csv("data/aggregate/field-day-2010-2025.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
```

## Scores

```{r}
fd |>
  ggplot() +
  facet_wrap(vars(year), ncol = 4) +
  geom_histogram(aes(x = final_score))
```

```{r}
fd |>
  dplyr::group_by(year) |>
  dplyr::summarize(min_score = min(final_score),
                median_score = median(final_score),
                max_score = max(final_score))
```
